name: laravel-vue-navigator
description: Ctrl+Click Vue / TS / JS axios calls → jump to the matching Laravel controller in your monorepo.
author: Danio Fiore

laravelVueNavigator.laravelPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the Laravel root (where artisan lives). Use 'auto' to scan up to 3 levels.

laravelVueNavigator.frontendPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the frontend root (Vue, Nuxt, or TS/JS). Use 'auto' to scan up to 3 levels.

laravelVueNavigator.apiBaseUrl.description: API path prefix for route matching (e.g. /api). When empty, read from Laravel bootstrap/app.php (default /api).

laravelVueNavigator.useArtisan.description: Prefer 'php artisan route:list --json'. Set false when PHP is unavailable locally (e.g. Docker-only) to use the static routes parser only and skip the missing-PHP warning.

laravelVueNavigator.routeCacheTtl.description: Seconds before the disk cache (.vscode/laravel-vue-navigator.cache.json) is stale. The file watcher refreshes sooner in normal use.

laravelVueNavigator.refreshDebounceMs.description: Debounce (ms) after saves under routes/, Controllers/, or Providers/.

enumDescriptions: Native Peek Definition panel with all matches.
Silently jump to the best match (no prompt).
laravelVueNavigator.ambiguityStrategy.description: When multiple Laravel routes match the same axios URL (e.g. template literals with ${var}).

enumDescriptions: Only routes tied for the highest specificity score.
All matching routes, including looser fallbacks.
laravelVueNavigator.ambiguityScope.description: Which candidates to show when disambiguating. Ignored when ambiguityStrategy is 'first'.

laravelVueNavigator.underlineUrls.description: Underline axios URL strings as clickable document links. When false, Ctrl+Click (Go to Definition) still works.

commands.title: Show route for endpoint under cursor
